title: mserver crashes with a boolean inside a between clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t2 (age INT, status BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE);
INSERT INTO t2 (age, status) VALUES (4850, TRUE), (4870, FALSE);
SELECT id FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON id BETWEEN 4800 AND age WHERE age = 4863;
